_comment: KalAI bot config — RR 1:1 + trailing TP, counter-trend mean-reversion signal. NOTE: 'validated' WR below are backtest_v3-method numbers (HTF-bias + fib + LTF stochRSI + buyRatio on 5m), NOT the live engine. Live engine is counter-trend on 1m and does NOT reproduce them (HTF-bias filtering yields 0 trades). See 'live_measured'. Bot runs 1m candles per index.js MODE_CFG, NOT the 'interval' fields here.
risk_model: notional = risk / sl_pct  (leverage only affects margin)

live_measured._comment: Actual measured live performance (testnet, counter-trend engine on 1m). Source: eval_trades.js (real fills) + backtest_live.js replay gate @1000x1m.
live_measured.replay_gate_wr: 20.8% (167 trades, gate=2) — local optimum, no config beat it
live_measured.interval_mismatch: WARN: modes.*.interval (15m/1h/4h) is NOT used by index.js; bot trades 1m candles regardless. Config intervals are decorative.
live_measured.note: Do NOT gate live optimizations against the 'validated' WR above — those are backtest_v3-method and unreproducible by the live engine.
